compiled_state.title: Add extensionless skill-trace-analyze wrapper for dso shim registration
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: SC5 requires the analysis script to be registered in the dso shim. The script is skill-trace-analyze.py but the shim expects an extensionless command. Add plugins/dso/scripts/skill-trace-analyze wrapper that invokes the Python script.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — shim dispatches to $DSO_ROOT/scripts/$CMD; need extensionless wrapper at plugins/dso/scripts/skill-trace-analyze that execs the .py file
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ — 3 tests all RED (wrapper-not-found). Ready to implement.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — created plugins/dso/scripts/skill-trace-analyze (chmod +x) as #!/bin/sh exec python3 wrapper
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — .claude/scripts/dso skill-trace-analyze --help exits 0 and shows usage correctly
comments.author: Test
